creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
- prepare bsd.tcl.mk for Tcl/Tk ver. 8.6
- take maintainership of bsd.tcl.mk
- will be commited together with ports lang/tcl86, lang/tcl86-thread, x11-toolkits/tk86, x11-toolkits/tk86-thread
- these ports need to be repocopied first, PR ports/130867
- does not break current ports using default tcl 8.4 or tcl 8.5
- awaiting portmgr approval
